name: Instant Pot Ethiopian Spicy Peas

ingredients.notes: or niter kibbeh if you have it

instructions: Sauté aromatics: Set Instant Pot to Sauté. Add oil, then onions, and cook 5–7 minutes until soft and lightly golden.
Add garlic and ginger; cook 30 seconds.
Bloom spices: Stir in berbere (and paprika/cumin if using). Cook 30–60 seconds until fragrant.
Pressure cook: Add rinsed split peas, water or broth, and salt. Stir well. Pressure cook on High for 14 minutes.
Natural release: Let pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick release.
Mash slightly: Stir vigorously or mash a bit with a spoon. It should be thick and stew-like, not watery.
Finish: Adjust salt and heat. Optional: a small squeeze of lemon juice.
